en: While Ezra prayed and made confession, weeping and casting himself down before the house of God, a very great assembly of men, women, and children, gathered to him out of Israel, for the people wept bitterly.
zh: 以斯拉禱告、認罪、哭泣，俯伏在 神的殿前的時候，有一大群以色列人，包括男女小孩，在他面前聚集；眾人也都痛哭。

en: And Shecaniah the son of Jehiel, of the sons of Elam, addressed Ezra: "We have broken faith with our God and have married foreign women from the peoples of the land, but even now there is hope for Israel in spite of this.
zh: 屬以攔的子孫、耶歇的兒子示迦尼對以斯拉說：“我們對 神不忠，娶了這地這外族女子為妻。雖然這樣，以色列現在還有希望。

en: Therefore let us make a covenant with our God to put away all these wives and their children, according to the counsel of my lord and of those who tremble at the commandment of our God, and let it be done according to the Law.
zh: 現在，我們應當與我們的 神立約，按著我主和那些因我們 神的誡命而戰兢的人所議定的，照著律法而行，送走這些妻子和她們所生的兒女。

en: Arise, for it is your task, and we are with you; be strong and do it."
zh: 你起來！因為這事全在你身上，我們支持你，你當堅強地去作。”

en: Then Ezra arose and made the leading priests and Levites and all Israel take oath that they would do as had been said. So they took the oath.
zh: 於是以斯拉起來，使祭司首領、利未人和以色列眾人起誓要照著這話去行；他們就起誓。

en: Then Ezra withdrew from before the house of God and went to the chamber of Jehohanan the son of Eliashib, where he spent the night, neither eating bread nor drinking water, for he was mourning over the faithlessness of the exiles.
zh: 以斯拉就從 神的殿前起來，走進以利亞實的兒子約哈難的屋裡去；他在那裡不吃飯，也不喝水，因為他為了被擄歸回的人的不忠而悲傷。

en: And a proclamation was made throughout Judah and Jerusalem to all the returned exiles that they should assemble at Jerusalem,
zh: 於是，領袖們就在猶大和耶路撒冷向所有被擄歸回的人發出通告，叫他們到耶路撒冷聚集。

en: and that if anyone did not come within three days, by order of the officials and the elders all his property should be forfeited, and he himself banned from the congregation of the exiles.
zh: 所有不照著眾領袖和眾長老所議定，在三日之內來到的人，所有的財物都要充公，也要從被擄歸回之人的會中被逐出。

en: Then all the men of Judah and Benjamin assembled at Jerusalem within the three days. It was the ninth month, on the twentieth day of the month. And all the people sat in the open square before the house of God, trembling because of this matter and because of the heavy rain.
zh: 於是猶大和便雅憫眾人，三日之內都在耶路撒冷聚集，那時是九月二十日，眾人坐在神殿的廣場上；因為這事，又因為天下大雨的緣故，大家就都戰慄發抖。

en: And Ezra the priest stood up and said to them, "You have broken faith and married foreign women, and so increased the guilt of Israel.
zh: 以斯拉祭司站起來，對他們說：“你們對 神不忠，娶了外族的女子為妻，增添了以色列的罪過。

en: Now then make confession to the LORD, the God of your fathers and do his will. Separate yourselves from the peoples of the land and from the foreign wives."
zh: 現在你們要向耶和華你們列祖的 神認罪，遵行他所喜悅的旨意，與這地的民族和外族的女子分離。”

en: Then all the assembly answered with a loud voice, "It is so; we must do as you have said.
zh: 全體會眾都大聲回答說：“你怎麼說，我們就怎麼行。

en: But the people are many, and it is a time of heavy rain; we cannot stand in the open. Nor is this a task for one day or for two, for we have greatly transgressed in this matter.
zh: 可是人太多，又逢下大雨的季節，我們不能停留在外面；這又不是一兩天可以完成的事，因為我們很多人在這事上犯了罪！

en: Let our officials stand for the whole assembly. Let all in our cities who have taken foreign wives come at appointed times, and with them the elders and judges of every city, until the fierce wrath of our God over this matter is turned away from us."
zh: 讓我們的領袖代表全體會眾站在耶和華面前，所有在我們的城中娶了外族女子為妻的人，也都要在指定的日期，與本城的長老和審判官一起來，解決了這事，好使 神因這事所發的烈怒離開我們。”

en: Only Jonathan the son of Asahel and Jahzeiah the son of Tikvah opposed this, and Meshullam and Shabbethai the Levite supported them.
zh: 只有亞撒黑的兒子約拿單和特瓦的兒子雅哈謝起來反對這提議，還有米書蘭和利未人沙比太支持他們。

en: Then the returned exiles did so. Ezra the priest selected men, heads of fathers' houses, according to their fathers' houses, each of them designated by name. On the first day of the tenth month they sat down to examine the matter;
zh: 於是，被擄歸回的人就這樣行。以斯拉祭司提名選派了一些人，是各宗族的族長，於十月初一他們一同坐下來查辦這事。

en: and by the first day of the first month they had come to the end of all the men who had married foreign women.
zh: 直到正月初一，他們才完成審查所有娶了外族的女子為妻的人。

en: Now there were found some of the sons of the priests who had married foreign women: Maaseiah, Eliezer, Jarib, and Gedaliah, some of the sons of Jeshua the son of Jozadak and his brothers.
zh: 在祭司子孫中，娶了外族的女子為妻的有耶書亞的子孫，約薩達的兒子和他的兄弟瑪西雅、以利以謝、雅立、基大利。

en: They pledged themselves to put away their wives, and their guilt offering was a ram of the flock for their guilt.
zh: 他們舉手起誓要送走他們的妻子，並獻贖罪祭。他們就獻上一隻公綿羊，作他們的贖罪祭。

en: Of the sons of Immer: Hanani and Zebadiah.
zh: 音麥的子孫中，有哈拿尼和西巴第雅。

en: Of the sons of Harim: Maaseiah, Elijah, Shemaiah, Jehiel, and Uzziah.
zh: 哈琳的子孫中，有瑪西雅、以利雅、示瑪雅、耶歇和烏西雅。

en: Of the sons of Pashhur: Elioenai, Maaseiah, Ishmael, Nethanel, Jozabad, and Elasah.
zh: 巴施戶珥的子孫中，有以利約乃、瑪西雅、以實瑪利、拿坦業、約撒拔和以利亞撒。

en: Of the Levites: Jozabad, Shimei, Kelaiah (that is, Kelita), Pethahiah, Judah, and Eliezer.
zh: 利未人中有約撒拔、示每、基拉雅 ，還有毘他希雅、猶大和以利以謝。

en: Of the singers: Eliashib. Of the gatekeepers: Shallum, Telem, and Uri.
zh: 歌唱者中，有以利亞實。守門的人中，有沙龍、提聯和烏利。

en: And of Israel: of the sons of Parosh: Ramiah, Izziah, Malchijah, Mijamin, Eleazar, Hashabiah, and Benaiah.
zh: 屬以色列人的巴錄的子孫中，有拉米、耶西雅、瑪基雅、米雅民、以利亞撒、瑪基雅、比拿雅。

en: Of the sons of Elam: Mattaniah, Zechariah, Jehiel, Abdi, Jeremoth, and Elijah.
zh: 以攔的子孫中，有瑪他尼、撒迦利亞、耶歇、押底、耶利末和以利雅。

en: Of the sons of Zattu: Elioenai, Eliashib, Mattaniah, Jeremoth, Zabad, and Aziza.
zh: 薩土的子孫中，有以利約乃、以利亞實、瑪他尼、耶利末、撒拔和亞西撒。

en: Of the sons of Bebai were Jehohanan, Hananiah, Zabbai, and Athlai.
zh: 比拜的子孫中，有約哈難、哈拿尼雅、薩拜和亞勒。

en: Of the sons of Bani were Meshullam, Malluch, Adaiah, Jashub, Sheal, and Jeremoth.
zh: 巴尼的子孫中，有米書蘭、瑪鹿、亞大雅、雅述、示押和耶利末。

en: Of the sons of Pahath-moab: Adna, Chelal, Benaiah, Maaseiah, Mattaniah, Bezalel, Binnui, and Manasseh.
zh: 巴哈．摩押的子孫中，有阿底拿、基拉、比拿雅、瑪西雅、瑪他尼、比撒列、賓內和瑪拿西。

en: Of the sons of Harim: Eliezer, Isshijah, Malchijah, Shemaiah, Shimeon,
zh: 哈琳的子孫中，有以利以謝、伊示雅、瑪基雅、示瑪雅、西緬、

en: Benjamin, Malluch, and Shemariah.
zh: 便雅憫、瑪鹿和示瑪利雅。

en: Of the sons of Hashum: Mattenai, Mattattah, Zabad, Eliphelet, Jeremai, Manasseh, and Shimei.
zh: 哈順的子孫中，有瑪特乃、瑪達他、撒拔、以利法列、耶利買、瑪拿西和示每。

en: Of the sons of Bani: Maadai, Amram, Uel,
zh: 巴尼的子孫中，有瑪代、暗蘭、烏益、

en: Benaiah, Bedeiah, Cheluhi,
zh: 比拿雅、比底雅、基祿、

en: Vaniah, Meremoth, Eliashib,
zh: 瓦尼雅、米利末、以利亞實、

en: Mattaniah, Mattenai, Jaasu.
zh: 瑪他尼、瑪特乃、雅掃、

en: Of the sons of Binnui: Shimei,
zh: 巴尼、賓內、示每、

en: Shelemiah, Nathan, Adaiah,
zh: 示利米雅、拿單、亞大雅、

en: Machnadebai, Shashai, Sharai,
zh: 瑪拿底拜、沙賽、沙賴、

en: Azarel, Shelemiah, Shemariah,
zh: 亞薩利、示利米雅、示瑪利雅、

en: Shallum, Amariah, and Joseph.
zh: 沙龍、亞瑪利雅、約瑟。

en: Of the sons of Nebo: Jeiel, Mattithiah, Zabad, Zebina, Jaddai, Joel, and Benaiah.
zh: 尼波的子孫中，有耶利、瑪他提雅、撒拔、西比拿、雅玳、約珥和比拿雅。

en: All these had married foreign women, and some of the women had even borne children.
zh: 這些人都娶了外族的女子為妻，但他們都把妻子和兒女送走了 。
